chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5367 of 2024 AND C.P.No.D-5368 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 27.01.2025 Mr.Muzzamil Hussain Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr.Agha Shahid Majeed and Mr.Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocates for the Respondent (F.B.R) Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Shiraz Ahmed, Director PCA and Mr.Imran Saifi, A.O. PCA are present. Parawise comments filed on behalf of respondent Nos.1 and 2 are taken record. Learned counsel for the Respondent (F.B.R) states that the assessment is held-up due to non-production of documents/information on the part of the petitioners. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that all the information/documentation sought shall be provided, whereafter the Department may pass a final order. It is jointly stated that these petitions may be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Office is directed to place copy of this order in connected petition. Judge Judge nasir
